name: Headless WordPress Frontend
description: The app acts as the frontend interface for a WordPress blog.///It utilizes GraphQL to fetch data from the WordPress blog.///The blog is optimized for SEO, dynamically generating all tags for every page.///The sitemap is dynamically generated, incorporating the routes of WordPress articles as well as the pages in the frontend app.

name: Urban Dictionary
description: The app serves as an interactive dictionary for informal expressions.///It leverages Supabase for backend operations, including user authentication and database management.///Features a like system and a report system for expressions.///The app includes a DASHBOARD for dictionary administration, where an admin can view a summary of website content and manage expressions (approve/reject/delete/restore) and user reports, as well as delete or restore user accounts.

name: To-do List
description: The app acts as a todo list for users.///It utilizes Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management.///Every todo can have a different color and can be edited, deleted, or marked as solved.
